summary: Completed testing of Pre-Sync Validation Wizard feature (iteration 88). All backend API tests pass (13/13). Frontend wizard opens correctly and displays Step 2 (Missing Days) with 4 unreported trading days. All UI components function as expected.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about DialogContent missing aria-describedby - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/profit/sync-validation returns correct structure with can_sync, issues, trading_start_date, missing_trade_days, pre_start_trades, summary
VERIFIED: POST /api/profit/set-trading-start-date correctly sets user trading start date
VERIFIED: POST /api/profit/balance-override creates balance override entry with correct calculated vs actual balance diff
VERIFIED: Frontend Sync button (data-testid='sync-balance-btn') opens Pre-Sync Wizard dialog
VERIFIED: Wizard Step Indicator shows 4 steps with green checkmark for completed, blue for active, gray for pending
VERIFIED: Step 2 (Missing Days) displays list of 4 unreported trading days with Adjust and DNT buttons per day
VERIFIED: 'Mark All Days as Did Not Trade' batch button is present
VERIFIED: User trading_start_date is '2026-02-01' so wizard correctly starts at Step 2

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Wizard opens correctly, Step 2 displays with all required elements)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Sync Validation Wizard is WORKING. The wizard opens when clicking the Sync button on Account Value card. For this test user (Ryan Salvador), trading_start_date is already set to 2026-02-01, so wizard starts at Step 2 (Missing Days). User has 4 missing trade days. The wizard properly shows step indicator with checkmarks for completed steps. Key data-testids: sync-balance-btn (trigger button), pre-sync-wizard-dialog (dialog container), sync-wizard-step-start-date/missing-days/pre-start/sync (step content areas), missing-day-{date} (individual missing day items), did-not-trade-{date} (DNT buttons), adjust-trade-{date} (Adjust buttons), mark-all-dnt-btn (batch button).

verified_features.details: Returns validation data with can_sync, issues, trading_start_date, missing_trade_days, pre_start_trades, summary
Sets user trading start date, validates YYYY-MM-DD format
Creates balance override entry with actual_balance, calculated_balance, adjustment_amount

verified_features.feature: Sync button on Account Value card
verified_features.details: Button with data-testid='sync-balance-btn' visible and clickable, opens wizard dialog
Dialog opens with proper step indicator and content for current step
Shows list of 4 missing trade days with Adjust/DNT buttons and Mark All batch button
Shows 4 steps (Start Date, Missing Days, Pre-Start, Sync) with correct styling for completed/active/pending
